data.title: Crypto market dip causes $1B outflows from Bitcoin, Ether ETFs, with US Bitcoin ETF seeing negative flows for January.
data.description: Data compiled by SoSoValue reveals that the United States saw a shift in spot Bitcoin ETF flows for January, with a significant amount of outflows occurring throughout the week. These outflows amounted to almost $1 billion, marking a notable trend in investor behavior towards Bitcoin ETFs in the country.

data.title: C3.ai stock up nearly 16% in pre-market trading as talks of a merger with Automation Anywhere emerge. Deal could result in Automation Anywhere acquiring C3.ai and going public. C3.ai offers enterprise AI software; Automation Anywhere valued at $6.8 billion in 2019. C3.ai founder Thomas Siebel steps down as CEO amid merger talks.
data.description: C3.ai Inc. saw its stock (NYSE: AI) experience a significant surge of 15.87% in the pre-market trading session on Wednesday. Reports have emerged indicating that discussions are underway for a potential merger between C3.ai, an enterprise AI software provider, and Automation Anywhere, a software company. If this merger indeed materializes, it would entail Automation Anywhere acquiring C3.ai and subsequently launching as a publicly traded entity. C3.ai specializes in supplying enterprise AI software utilized by various clients, including the likes of the U.S. Air Force, operating across sectors such as energy and manufacturing. On the other hand, Automation Anywhere is focused on developing task-automation software and was previously valued at $6.8 billion by private investors in 2019. Following the departure of C3.ai's founder, Thomas Siebel, from the CEO position, the company is yet to formally comment on this potential deal. This development marks a notable event in the industry landscape and the full details can be found on platforms like Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stocks surge with Nasdaq eyeing record high; Dow Jones Futures up. Tesla, Meta, Microsoft in spotlight. Fed's Powell to speak.
data.description: Numerous stocks showed upward momentum with the Nasdaq leading the way and the S&P 500 reaching a peak. However, attention is now turning to key players such as Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Dow Jones Futures are indicating a positive outlook with the Nasdaq potentially setting a new all-time high. These developments come amid a dynamic market environment where investor focus is on influential companies and potential market-moving events.

data.title: PPL Corp (NYSE:PPL) to conduct webcast on 2025 earnings results on Feb. 20. Vincent Sorgi, CEO, will lead discussion.
data.description: PPL Corporation, a leading energy company listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol PPL, has announced that it will unveil its consolidated financial performance for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 on Friday, February 20. The President and CEO of PPL, Vincent Sorgi, alongside other key executives, will delve into the details of the earnings results. This update comes from Allentown, Pennsylvania, and marks a pivotal moment for the company as stakeholders anticipate the figures that will be presented.
Achievement: Completed successful placement of bond tap issue, raising $50 million for company expansion.

data.title: Wall Street traders predict S&P 500 to soar to 7600-7800 by Dec. 31, 2026 according to Kalshi, with 19% wagers in that range.
data.description: Traders on Kalshi predict that the S&P 500 will reach between 7600 and 7800 by December 31, 2026. Currently, 19% of traders foresee the index closing within this range. This forecast suggests a bullish sentiment, projecting a continued uptrend for the benchmark index tracking major U.S. stocks. In 2025, the S&P 500 saw gains of approximately 16-18% amid a volatile year influenced by President Donald Trump's actions. These insights are drawn from a prediction market contract on Kalshi regarding the S&P 500's year-end 2026 performance.

data.title: Bonaccord Capital Partners named 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News.
data.description: P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), a prominent private markets solutions provider, and Bonaccord Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in offering growth capital and strategic assistance to middle-market private market sponsors, have jointly declared that Bonaccord has been honored with the title of 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News. This recognition underscores Bonaccord's exceptional performance in the industry. The acknowledgment solidifies their position as a leading entity in this sector.
